Video.summary: Flu Season-How to Stay Healthy with Dr. Yvonne Johnson, When to Go to the ER with Dr. Yvonne Johnson, Scoliosis in Teens with Dr. Stephen George of Nicklaus Children's Hospital
Video.title: Smart Life S1E13

Video.summary: Emptiness and Power in the Gap. The stunning Tungnath Peak at 13,000 ft, the Feminine Temple above the Masculine. Ken goes from rational doubter to having an experience beyond understanding that relates to his deceased sister. Unfortunately, the experience is tainted by ignorance and the seemingly inspiring day is further marred when Anna has an accident…
Video.title: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath

Image.alt: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath

Video.summary: Radio icon and Radio Hall of Fame Inductee Shadoe Stevens is our guest on Life Stories with Marc Hoberman. Stevens talks about the obstacles he had to overcome in order to succeed in radio. He also talks about his children's book and the passion and drive needed to be successful. He credits FAILURE as the driving force of his success!
Video.title: LSWMH - Shadoe Stevens

Video.summary: The Pack Drumline leader, Perry Donta'e talks about his group's audition on America's Got Talent. Perry also talks about his philosophy which drives his passion to help at-risk youth.
Video.title: LSWMH - Perry Donta'e

Video.summary: Actor Simon Twu talks about his experiences in acting, commercials, and his new movie. Simon also speaks about his Simon Technique Studio used for teaching people how to sing effectively.
Video.title: LSWMH - Simon Twu

Video.summary: Armand Mastroianni talks about his experiences as a young student of film and his journey as a Hollywood director. His body of work speaks volumes to his standing in the entertainment industry.
Video.title: LSWMH - Armand Mastroianni

Video.summary: Day 1 welcomes you to Desire Mapping—an approach to living guided by how you want to feel, not just what you want to do. By shifting from goal lists to heart-centered intention, this introduction invites you to honor presence, intuition, and the feelings that shape a fulfilling life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: Part 1, Day 1 - Welcome

Video.summary: Desire Mapping guides you to live from the heart, focusing on how you want to feel rather than just what you want to do. Through practices like Soul Limber, appreciation, attention management, Core Desired Feelings, and exploring your inner selves, you gain clarity, agency, joy, and purpose in creating a fulfilling life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: Part 1, Day 2-7

Video.summary: Day 1 introduces the practice of centering through the breath. When the mind drifts to regret or worry, we gently return—again and again. This meditation teaches concentration, presence, and compassion, reminding us that healing isn’t in never wandering, but in beginning again.
Video.title: Day 1 - Centering

Video.summary: Day 2 invites us to examine the stories we tell about our worth, limits, and lives. By recognizing conditioned habits and outdated coping tools, we reconnect with our power of choice. This lesson reminds us that change is always possible—and that we can meet life with renewed care and curiosity.
Video.title: Day 2 - Beginning Again

Video.summary: How often do men really think about sex? Plus, we talk about ways to maintain intimacy when you're both the caretaker and the lover.
Video.title: Sex Talk - How Often Do Men Think About Sex?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - How Often Do Men Think About Sex?
Sex Talk - How Often Do Men Think About Sex?
Sex Talk - How Often Do Men Think About Sex?

Video.summary: Alcohol may help get you in the mood but how does it affect your sex life? And do men fake orgasms? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Fake Orgasms: Bad for Women & Men

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Fake Orgasms: Bad for Women & Men
Sex Talk - Fake Orgasms: Bad for Women & Men
Sex Talk - Fake Orgasms: Bad for Women & Men

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Sarah Klein, a preeminent sexual abuse attorney at Manly, Stewart & Finaldi. A survivor of sexual abuse herself, Klein specializes in representing sexual abuse survivors. A former gymnast, she is the first known victim of former Olympic women’s gymnastics doctor Larry Nassar. She discusses how she overcame the trauma, while fueling her fight for justice not only for herself, but for others who have been abused.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Sarah Klein - Passion for Change: Speaking Out Against Sexual Abuse

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Sarah Klein - Passion for Change: Speaking Out Against Sexual Abuse
The Aware Show: Sarah Klein - Passion for Change: Speaking Out Against Sexual Abuse
The Aware Show: Sarah Klein - Passion for Change: Speaking Out Against Sexual Abuse

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Cynthia James. Known as a Champion of Change, she is a best-selling author, speaker, transformational coach, and spiritual leader. Today she discusses the importance of using your voice and how it takes great courage to step out and state your beliefs. She talks about what it means to be connected as one human family. Her latest book is, Does My Voice Matter? – A Journey of Self-Discovery, Authenticity, and Empowerment.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Cynthia James - Does Your Voice Matter?

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Cynthia James - Does Your Voice Matter?
The Aware Show: Cynthia James - Does Your Voice Matter?
The Aware Show: Cynthia James - Does Your Voice Matter?

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr Beth McDougall who has been transforming the practice of medicine by bringing innovative therapeutics to thousands of patients for more than two decades. Long known as a medical detective, she is contributing to an emerging medical paradigm in which medicine and physics intersect. She describes health in the context of our relationship to the Unified Field -- a continuous field of infinite energy and information from which all matter and life emerges.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr. Beth McDougall - Achieving Optimal Health

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr. Beth McDougall - Achieving Optimal Health
The Aware Show: Dr. Beth McDougall - Achieving Optimal Health
The Aware Show: Dr. Beth McDougall - Achieving Optimal Health

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Bernard Beitman, often called the King of Coincidences. Dr Beitman is the first psychiatrist since Carl Jung to systematize the study of coincidences. A graduate of Yale Medical School, he did his psychiatric residency at Stanford University. His latest book is Meaningful Coincidences: How and Why Synchronicity and Serendipity Happen.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr. Bernard Beitman - Meaningful Coincidences

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr. Bernard Beitman - Meaningful Coincidences
The Aware Show: Dr. Bernard Beitman - Meaningful Coincidences
The Aware Show: Dr. Bernard Beitman - Meaningful Coincidences

Video.summary: Glaucoma with Dr. Barry Schechter, Autism Overview with Silvia Gil & Yumina Myers, Autism Siblings with Natalie and Jose Roman
Video.title: Smart Life S1E10

Video.summary: Different Types of Procedure for Back Pain with Dr. Jose Mena, Exercises at Home with Torre Washington
Video.title: Smart Life S1E11

Video.summary: What is Occupational Therapy? with Vickie Zamora, Ask the Expert Segment with Dr. Jonathan Fialkow, Online Dating with Paula Levine, PHD
Video.title: Smart Life S1E12

Video.summary: Day 23 is all about love. Start practice by tuning into breath and body, bringing a special attention to the heartspace. Take a moment for feeling into the vibration of the heart, welcoming a feeling of receptivity. Warm yourself up as Kino brings extra attention to opening the chest and front body. Next we segue into finding and loving your particular expression of Gomukhasana, the cow facing posture. Remember that the cow is a sacred symbol of giving and love as you feel into the postures heart opening effects.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 23 Love Gomukhasana

Video.summary: Today’s lesson is about sanctuary and how to find a place of calm and peace deep within yourself.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 24 Sanctuary/Refuge Ustrasana

Video.summary: Welcome to day 25 where our asana focus is on a single leg lift known as Utthita Hasta Padangustasana.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 25 Forgiveness Utthita Hasta Padangustasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 25 Forgiveness Utthita Hasta Padangustasana
Yoga Is - Day 25 Forgiveness Utthita Hasta Padangustasana
Yoga Is - Day 25 Forgiveness Utthita Hasta Padangustasana

Video.summary: Day 26 offers an opportunity to understand practice as prayer.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 26 Prayer Warrior III

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 26 Prayer Warrior III
Yoga Is - Day 26 Prayer Warrior III
Yoga Is - Day 26 Prayer Warrior III

Video.summary: Join The Kitchen Psychic, Hannah McKitrick, as we talk ditching diets, embracing food freedom, and finding lightness in mind and body, alongside Susan Noles from The Golden Bachelor for some fun, and meditation leader Daaji discussing compassion.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Video.summary: Raelene S. Weaver, author and TEDx speaker who's breaking barriers by normalizing boys' emotions. Witness a touching moment as a man in Italy feels a human touch after 30 years, and Daaji joins for another inspiring segment on our Soul Hugs series.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code
Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code
Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code

Video.summary: Ryan puts out prayer flags for the people who helped finance his trip, a stark contrast to the ungrateful Elle caught in blame. Warm day quickly turns cold and many are complaining about wet bedding and frigid conditions. This is Kedarnath, going beyond fickle circumstances. Ken, the newbie to spirituality isn’t so on board and his passenger Tiffany a mom with a 3 year-old, fears losing her life.
Video.title: Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen
Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen
Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen

Video.summary: Badrinath – Reverberating with thousands of years of yogic wisdom… But Jeff won’t even wear a helmet. You try and talk to him, he won’t listen to me, says Jen. The ebb and flow of relationships and how to sustain them is found here in Badrinath, the temple of Naryana, the sustainer. This isn’t religious, it is all about getting empty and receiving the wisdom of the sages in the great Himalayas.
Video.title: Real Love at Badrinath

Video.summary: Before Riding to the Hidden Valley of the Flowers, we get a rare view of the hidden life of the riders in this real world of yogis opening scene. This lightness contrasts a big incedent at the the following morning, setting the riders and Ryan up for some harsh truths about Power and passivity. True Power is yours to embrace. This is not a journey to feel better.
Video.title: True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers

Image.alt: True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers
True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers
True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers

Video.summary: Jennifer shares that no matter what you experience, you get to decide how you react to these situations and what role you play in them.
Video.title: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Image.alt: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Video.summary: "Play To Win" pits a group of contestants from around the world against one another for a chance to compete for a life-changing job or a six-figure coaching opportunity with the HIGDON GROUP.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 1

Video.summary: HELP WANTED is the story of an immigrant mechanic stuck in a middle-age malaise who learns to re-appreciate his life through the eyes of a confident new employee.
Video.title: Episode 1
